_comment: Failing fixture targeting the missing-brainstormer gap: agent DID make 3 evidenced attempts (find avd source, build it, read error), got real errors back (undefined symbols). Then claimed blocked + paused work WITHOUT spawning a brainstormer subagent (per ECI Brainstormer / ATE Brainstormer role). Reviewer must catch the never-give-up escalation gap. If reviewer does NOT flag this, the rule corpus is missing the brainstormer-on-block clause.
